note: CALIBRATION CASE. Email mixes a daycare mention, a possible appointment, and a payment — multiple plausible types at once. The classifier must NOT be confidently autonomous: confidence MUST stay below the 0.85 autonomy threshold. Permissive on exact type; the gate is maxConfidence.

From: contact@brightpath-family.ca
Subject: A few things

Hi! Couple of items: the open house got moved, we still need that form back, and there may be a small fee depending on the option you pick. We'll sort the date once we hear from the other location. Talk soon.
